creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ILUXA from comment #0)
> https://bugzilla.abisource.com/attachment.cgi?id=5837&action=view

Linking to an upstream commit instead may save maintainer a bit of time.

https://www.abisource.com/viewvc?view=rev&revision=35394

and can be converted to

PATCH_SITES=	https://github.com/AbiWord/${PORTNAME}/commit/
PATCHFILES=	cec2fda355b6.patch:-p1
